title: Mark Greenberg
compiled_truth: Mark Greenberg is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-13 to 2002-06-21), Mark Greenberg sent 381 and received 949 emails, totalling 1330 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (270), [Bob Shults](people/bob-shults) (60), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (54), [ Taylor](people/taylor) (33), [Stephanie Panus](people/stephanie-panus) (28).
